summary: PluginKind "tui" is still a first-class plugin kind despite TUI CLI being removed — should be evaluated for deprecation
details: PluginKind includes "tui" as a first-class member alongside "server" and "desktop". With the TUI CLI removed, this may be vestigial. However, plugin SDK consumers may reference it, so removal requires coordination with @opencode-ai/plugin SDK. Flagged as debt for future audit.

summary: TUI HTTP API server code (groups/tui.ts, handlers/tui.ts, tui-control.ts) may be unused after TUI CLI removal — needs audit
details: Three files form the TUI HTTP API: groups/tui.ts (API group definitions), handlers/tui.ts (command handlers), and shared/tui-control.ts (request/response queue). These may still be consumed by the desktop app or plugin SDK, but warrant a targeted audit to confirm. Flagged as debt for future investigation.

summary: Typecheck baseline has ~200 pre-existing errors across campaign/, server/httpapi/claims, scripts/, and test/ — makes lane-specific validation noisy
